TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'mâ'to-hynna dou ni-pouh-kidi-kidi pouh-limou-limou ta ti Jesus pa-sih-koua ki sat kyttiæn 'æb ki rouha ki Pæhta-tæutæu-en tyn, ka ni-mali-daæua hynna, mahtæutæuuh matta sasou tou æuma-æuma nein.

Ka ni-k'mâ'to-hynna dou ni-pouh-kidi-kidi pouh-limou-limou ta ti Jesus pa-sih-koua ki sat kyttiæn 'æb ki rouha ki Pæhta-tæutæu-en tyn, ka ni-mali-daæua hynna, mahtæutæuuh matta sasou tou æuma-æuma nein.
S.TRANS: Ende het is geschiet doe Jesus CIA hadde liine twaelf Discipelen bebelen te gheben dat hy ban daer boort gingh om te leeren ende prediken in haere eden. -
And it came to pass, when Jesus had made an end of commanding his twelve disciples, he departed thence to teach and to preach in their cities.
耶穌吩咐完了十二個門徒，就離開那裏，往各城去傳道、教訓人。 （路7‧18－35）

S.FORM: Râ dou illing-hen ti Joan-nes tou sangat ta na ringei ti Christus, ni-a-douhâ madingi ki Pah-tatæutæu-en tyn.
Râ dou illing-hen ti Joan-nes tou sangat ta na ringei ti Christus, ni-a-douhâ madingi ki Pah-tatæutæu-en tyn.
S.TRANS: Joannes inde gebanckenisse gehoort hebbende de wercken Chaitt sond twee ban [ijne difcipelen.
Now when John had heard in the prison the works of Christ, he sent two of his disciples,
約翰在監裏聽見基督所做的事，就打發兩個門徒去，

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Ymhou kaua ta tama-yrou-'ah, râ amat-ei-miæn lava ki pani?
Ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Ymhou kaua ta tama-yrou-'ah, râ amat-ei-miæn lava ki pani?
S.TRANS: Ende feyde tot hem Zijt ghy de ghene die komen foude of berwachten wp eenen anderen
And said unto him, Art thou he that should come, or do we look for another?
問他說：「那將要來的是你嗎？還是我們等候別人呢？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæi-vli ta ti Jesus koumma neini-æn; Ouquâ li-kough-â ghnau ti Joannes-an ki ata, ka 'æillingigh-'noumi ka ka-kytt'an-oumi.
Ka ni-mattæi-vli ta ti Jesus koumma neini-æn; Ouquâ li-kough-â ghnau ti Joannes-an ki ata, ka 'æillingigh-'noumi ka ka-kytt'an-oumi.
S.TRANS: Ende Jekus antwoordde ende sepde tot haer : Gaet henen ende boodtschapt Joanni weder het gene ghy hoort ende liet.
Jesus answered and said unto them, Go and shew John again those things which ye do hear and see:
耶穌回答說：「你們去，把所聽見、所看見的事告訴約翰。

S.FORM: Kmytt-'ato ta ni-mavoutta; marmoun-ato mou-nau-nang ta ni-mapilei, paka-kouptigh-en-ato ta Leproos [ka ni-on-taum,] hmil-lingig-ato ta ni-mattoulé, paæhpi-in-ato ta ni-mapatei, ka hagnau-en-ato matta-sasou ta malimouk.

Kmytt-'ato ta ni-mavoutta; marmoun-ato mou-nau-nang ta ni-mapilei, paka-kouptigh-en-ato ta Leproos [ka ni-on-taum,] hmil-lingig-ato ta ni-mattoulé, paæhpi-in-ato ta ni-mapatei, ka hagnau-en-ato matta-sasou ta malimouk.
S.TRANS: Beblinde worden fiende ende de kreupele wandelen de melaetsche worden gerepnicht ende de doobe hooren de dooden worden opgeweckt efi df armen wort het Euangelium berkondight,
The blind receive their sight, and the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, and the deaf hear, the dead are raised up, and the poor have the gospel preached to them.
就是瞎子看見，瘸子行走，長大痲瘋的潔淨，聾子聽見，死人復活，窮人有福音傳給他們。

S.FORM: Ka tæi-riang ta teni k'assi an-neig-en pa-hali-dæuræ paka-varau jau-an.
Ka tæi-riang ta teni k'assi an-neig-en pa-hali-dæuræ paka-varau jau-an.
S.TRANS: Endesaligh 1s hy die gen mn niet en sal ge-erger
And blessed is he, whosoever shall not be offended in me.
凡不因我跌倒的就有福了！」

S.FORM: Ka tou ou-dadarang-en nein k'anna, ni-mattæi-nannamou ta ti Jesus ki makoi-lalaulau mattæi-mymmia ti Joannes-an, Ni-mou-pænæh-kamou tou poulæh kmytta ki mang? Riquah [lava] ka pa-pataplaplag-gin ki vare?

Ka tou ou-dadarang-en nein k'anna, ni-mattæi-nannamou ta ti Jesus ki makoi-lalaulau mattæi-mymmia ti Joannes-an, Ni-mou-pænæh-kamou tou poulæh kmytta ki mang? Riquah [lava] ka pa-pataplaplag-gin ki vare?
S.TRANS: And as they departed, Jesus began to say unto the multitudes concerning John, What went ye out into the wilderness to see? A reed shaken with the wind?
他們走的時候，耶穌就對眾人講論約翰說：「你們從前出到曠野是要看甚麼呢？要看風吹動的蘆葦嗎？

S.FORM: Râ ni-mou-pænæh-kamou kmytta ki mang? Ta'u [lava] ka mammi-ato ki mahahpul ka koula-mogh? Kytt'ei, neni ka mammia ki [koulamogh ka] ma-hahpul, ta itou-qua tou tallagh ki Mei-sa-sou ka sibavau.
Râ ni-mou-pænæh-kamou kmytta ki mang? Ta'u [lava] ka mammi-ato ki mahahpul ka koula-mogh? Kytt'ei, neni ka mammia ki [koulamogh ka] ma-hahpul, ta itou-qua tou tallagh ki Mei-sasou ka sibavau.
S.TRANS: Mae: wat zijt ghy uytgegaen te fien + Gen mensche met fachte kleederen bekleet Siet die sachte [kleederen] dragen zijn in Der honingen huysen.
But what went ye out for to see? A man clothed in soft raiment? behold, they that wear soft clothing are in kings' houses.
你們出去到底是要看甚麼？要看穿細軟衣服的人嗎？那穿細軟衣服的人是在王宮裏。

S.FORM: Râ ni-mou-pæmæh-kamou kmytta ki mang? Tama-mattæi-tan [lava]? Ka d'lligh-koun-nau-kamou-râ, ki masaoun-appa tou vavau ki kidi ki Tama-mattæi-tan-da.
Râ ni-mou-pæmæh-kamou kmytta ki mang? Tama-mattæi-tan [lava]? Ka d'lligh-koun-nau-kamou-râ, ki masaoun-appa tou vavau ki kidi ki Tama-mattæi-tan-da.
S.TRANS: Mae: wat rije ghy uytghegaen te fien : Gen Propheet Jae ick fegghe u oock beel meer dan een Propheer.
But what went ye out for to see? A prophet? yea, I say unto you, and more than a prophet.
你們出去究竟是為甚麼？是要看先知嗎？我告訴你們，是的，他比先知大多了。

S.FORM: Ka teni ta ti atta ka na sa-soulat-ato, Kytt'ei, pa-dingi-en-au ta Tama-ghnau-au pa-si-ourouro ki vlung-oho, ka si-dadarang-ah ki ki d'arang-oho si-ourouro ym-hou-an.
Ka teni ta ti atta ka na sa-soulat-ato, Kytt'ei, pa-dingi-en-au ta Tama-ghnau-au pa-si-ourouro ki vlung-oho, ka si-dadarang-ah ki ki d'arang-oho si-ourouro ym-hou-an.
S.TRANS: Want dele is t ban den welcken gheschreben fact Siet ick sende mijnen Engel booruw' arngesichte die uwen wegh bereyden sal boor u henen.
For this is he, of whom it is written, Behold, I send my messenger before thy face, which shall prepare thy way before thee.
經上記着說：『我要差遣我的使者在你前面預備道路』，所說的就是這個人。

S.FORM: Dilligh koun-nau-kamou-râ, Neini-æn ka ni-pei-alak ki jnæ-jna, assi ni-æhpit ta timamang ka tou vavau ki kidi ti Joannes-an ka Tama-æulough: Râ teni ka ma-saoun tou rarim ki kidi tou Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vul-lum, masaoun-ato tou vavau ki kidi teni-æn.

Dilligh koun-nau-kamou-râ, Neini-æn ka ni-pei-alak ki jnæ-jna, assi ni-æhpit ta timamang ka tou vavau ki kidi ti Joannes-an ka Tama-æulough: Râ teni ka ma-saoun tou rarim ki kidi tou Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vul-lum, masaoun-ato tou vavau ki kidi teni-æn.
S.TRANS: Voorwaer fegge ick u Onder de ghene dieban souwtn geboren zijn en is niemandt opgeltaen merrder dan Joannes de Doopr: : Doch die. de minsteis im her koninckriick de: Hemelen is meerder dan hp. |
Verily I say unto you, Among them that are born of women there hath not risen a greater than John the Baptist: notwithstanding he that is least in the kingdom of heaven is greater than he.
我實在告訴你們，凡婦人所生的，沒有一個興起來大過施洗約翰的；然而天國裏最小的比他還大。

S.FORM: Ka na kidi ki wæi ti Joan-nes ka Tama-'æulough tou kidi-appa-hnyn, tounnoun-nen ki kailh-gen ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnounki ki vullu-bullum, ka neni ka tama-tounnoun mourbo tammia ki an-na.
Ka na kidi ki wæi ti Joan-nes ka Tama-'æulough tou kidi-appa-hnyn, tounnoun-nen ki kailh-gen ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnounki ki vullu-bullum, ka neni ka tama-tounnoun mourbo tammia ki an-na.
S.TRANS: Ende ban de Joannes des Boopt:s rot nu toe wordt het Koninckriick der Hemelen ghewelt arngedaen ende de geweldigers nemen het lelbe met gewelt.
And from the days of John the Baptist until now the kingdom of heaven suffereth violence, and the violent take it by force.
從施洗約翰的時候到如今，天國是努力進入的，努力的人就得着了。

S.FORM: Ka ymmid ki na Tama-mattæi-tan, ki Tatouhko-appa, ni-mattæi-tan tou kidi ti Joannes-an.
Ka ymmid ki na Tama-mattæi-tan, ki Tatouhko-appa, ni-mattæi-tan tou kidi ti Joannes-an.
S.TRANS: Want alle de Propheten ende de Wet hebben tot Joannemtoe gep1opheteert.
For all the prophets and the law prophesied until John.
因為眾先知和律法說預言，到約翰為止。

S.FORM: Ka rou mamoei-kamou læuung [ki sou k'atta] teni ta ti Elias ka pa-irou-'auh.
Ka rou mamoei-kamou læuung [ki sou k'atta] teni ta ti Elias ka pa-irou-'auh.
S.TRANS: Endeolo ghy het wile gennemen hy is Elias die komen soude,
And if ye will receive it, this is Elias, which was for to come.
你們若肯領受，這人就是那應當來的以利亞。

S.FORM: Ti-mamang ka akou-tan-gira ki 'æ-illingi-lingig, hmillingi-ga-ato.
Ti-mamang ka akou-tan-gira ki 'æ-illingi-lingig, hmillingi-ga-ato.
S.TRANS: Wie ooren heefc om te hooren dir hoore, =
He that hath ears to hear, let him hear.
有耳可聽的，就應當聽！

S.FORM: Ka pæhkaulaul-'au-mau ti-mamang-an ta kavoui-vouyl-en k'atta? Mahkaulaul ato ki rarau-wei ka miraaroung tou 'ǣiræghan, ka tmætæm ki lam nein,
Ka pæhkaulaul-'au-mau ti-mamang-an ta kavoui-vouyl-en k'atta? Mahkaulaul ato ki rarau-wei ka miraaroung tou 'ǣiræghan, ka tmætæm ki lam nein,
S.TRANS: Boch waer by falick dic gefiachte bergelijcken # Het is geliick dekinderkens die op de mexckten [itten] ende haren gefelen toeroepen
But whereunto shall I liken this generation? It is like unto children sitting in the markets, and calling unto their fellows,
我可用甚麼比這世代呢？好像孩童坐在街市上招呼同伴，說：

S.FORM: Mattæi-k'ma-hynna ki sou, Ni-pepariringid-den-j-en-ka-mou, ka assi-kamou ni-rmang-toul-toultoul. Nitaka-tangi-tangi-ka-me tmatei, ka assi-kamou ni-tmangi-tangi.
Mattæi-k'ma-hynna ki sou, Ni-pepariringid-den-j-en-ka-mou, ka assi-kamou ni-rmang-toul-toultoul. Nitaka-tangi-tangi-ka-me tmatei, ka assi-kamou ni-tmangi-tangi.
S.TRANS: Ende seggen Wp hebbenu op de flupte ghespeelt ende ghp en hebr niee ghedanft. Wy hebben u klaeghlieden gesongen ende ghy en hebt niet geweent. s
And saying, We have piped unto you, and ye have not danced; we have mourned unto you, and ye have not lamented.
我們向你們吹笛，

S.FORM: Ka ni-iroua ta ti Joannes, assi kman, assi myt, Ka akou Lit-tou, koun nein.
Ka ni-iroua ta ti Joannes, assi kman, assi myt, Ka akou Littou, koun nein.
S.TRANS: WantJoannes is geKomen noch etende noch dunckende ende sn seggen Pp heeft den Dupbel.
For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, He hath a devil.
約翰來了，也不吃也不喝，人就說他是被鬼附着的；

S.FORM: Irou-ato ta Alak ki ka'æu-loung, ka kman ka myt, ka koun nein da, Kytt'ei ta ka'æuloung ka maourour, ka Tama-dihou, riou ki Tama-imugh ki tama-ka-varau-appa. Râ ni-pou-tiktik-en ta pakousacyng-an ki alalak nein.

Irou-ato ta Alak ki ka'æuloung, ka kman ka myt, ka koun nein da, Kytt'ei ta ka'æuloung ka maourour, ka Tama-dihou, riou ki Tama-imugh ki tama-ka-varau-appa. Râ ni-pou-tiktik-en ta pakousacyng-an ki alalak nein.
S.TRANS: Be Sone des menfchen 1s gekomen etende eff drinckende ende sy seggen Hiet daer een mensche [die] eenbraet ende wijn-fuyper fis, Jeen byient ban tollenaren endesondaren.Doch de whheyt is gerechtbeerdight geworden ban hare kinderen.
The Son of man came eating and drinking, and they say, Behold a man gluttonous, and a winebibber, a friend of publicans and sinners. But wisdom is justified of her children.
人子來了，也吃也喝，人又說他是貪食好酒的人，是稅吏和罪人的朋友。但智慧之子總以智慧為是 。」 （路10‧13－15）

S.FORM: Anna-ta ni-mei-naunamou mei-rararei ki æuma-æuma ka ni-pa-ste hynna ta'madagh ki kailh-gen tyn ka ourynghau-en, ka assi matamha si-lala ta neni.
Anna-ta ni-mei-naunamou mei-rararei ki æuma-æuma ka ni-pa-ste hynna ta'madagh ki kailh-gen tyn ka ourynghau-en, ka assi matamha si-lala ta neni.
S.TRANS: Boe begon hy de fteden in dewelcke shne krachten meett ghefchiedt waren te berwhten om datse Haer niet bekeert en hadden,
Then began he to upbraid the cities wherein most of his mighty works were done, because they repented not:
耶穌在諸城中行了許多異能，那些城的人終不悔改，就在那時候責備他們，說：

S.FORM: Ælǣi ymhou ki Korazin, ælǣi ymhou ki Bethzaida: Ka rou ni-pa-ste tou Tyrus lava tou-Sidon lava ta maligh ka na ringei ka ni-pa-ste ymoumi-æn, ynna matamha si-lala kalhei tou ni-manna, lou-moa tou avo-appa ta neni.

Ælǣi ymhou ki Korazin, ælǣi ymhou ki Bethzaida: Ka rou ni-pa-ste tou Tyrus lava tou-Sidon lava ta maligh ka na ringei ka ni-pa-ste ymoumi-æn, ynna matamha si-lala kalhei tou ni-manna, lou-moa tou avo-appa ta neni.
S.TRANS: Wee n Choralin wee u Bethlaida ; Want foo in Tyrus efi Zidon de krachten waren gheschiet die in u gefchiedt zijn sy ouden haer entydes in fack ende alche bekeert hebben.
Woe unto thee, Chorazin! woe unto thee, Bethsaida! for if the mighty works, which were done in you, had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes.
「哥拉汛哪，你有禍了！伯賽大啊，你有禍了！因為在你們中間所行的異能，若行在泰爾、西頓，他們早已披麻蒙灰悔改了。

S.FORM: Anna ta pasousou-en-au-kamou râ, Ka saoun-eih Imaua ki pahahavouhavoung ta Tyrus, ki Sidon-appa ymoumi-æn, tou wæ'i ki papæmæmæh-en da.
Anna ta pasousou-en-au-kamou râ, Ka saoun-eih Imaua ki pahahavouhavoung ta Tyrus, ki Sidon-appa ymoumi-æn, tou wæ'i ki papæmæmæh-en da.
S.TRANS: Doch ick fegghe u Het sal Tyrus ende Zidon berdraeghlicker 3yit in den dagh des oordeels dan uheden.
But I say unto you, It shall be more tolerable for Tyre and Sidon at the day of judgment, than for you.
但我告訴你們，當審判的日子，泰爾、西頓所受的，比你們還容易受呢！

S.FORM: Ka ymhou ki Kapernaum, ka ni-pou-vavau-en ki kidi pouva-vul-vullum, mou-houl-an-eih-kow tou kalæu-hæu-en. Alei ka rou ni-pa-ste tou Sodoma ta maligh ka na ringei k'anna ka ni-pa-ste ymhou-an, ynna itou-kaqua tou kidi ki wæ'i k'atta ta neni.

Ka ymhou ki Kapernaum, ka ni-pou-vavau-en ki kidi pouva-vul-vullum, mou-houl-an-eih-kow tou kalæu-hæu-en. Alei ka rou ni-pa-ste tou Sodoma ta maligh ka na ringei k'anna ka ni-pa-ste ymhou-an, ynna itou-kaqua tou kidi ki wæ'i k'atta ta neni.
S.TRANS: Ende ghy Cape: naum die tot den Hemel toe zijt brhooght ghy sult tot de helle toe neder geltooten worden. Want soo in Sodoma die krachten waren geschiet die in u geschiet 3hn sp foude tot op den hupdigen dagh gebleben zijn.

And thou, Capernaum, which art exalted unto heaven, shalt be brought down to hell: for if the mighty works, which have been done in thee, had been done in Sodom, it would have remained until this day.
迦百農啊，你已經升到天上，將來必墜落陰間；因為在你那裏所行的異能，若行在所多瑪，它還可以存到今日。

S.FORM: Rå ka pasousou-en-au-ka-mou, Ka faoun-eih Imaua ta pa-hahavouavoung ki pourough ki Sodoma ymhou-an, tou wæ'i ki pæmæmæh-en-da.
Rå ka pasousou-en-au-ka-mou, Ka faoun-eih Imaua ta pa-hahavouavoung ki pourough ki Sodoma ymhou-an, tou wæ'i ki pæmæmæh-en-da.
S.TRANS: Doch ick fegghe u Dat het den lande ban Sodoma berd:raeghlicker sal in den dag des oordeels danu,
But I say unto you, That it shall be more tolerable for the land of Sodom in the day of judgment, than for thee.
但我告訴你們，當審判的日子，所多瑪所受的，比你還容易受呢！」 （路10‧21－22）

S.FORM: D'lligh tou kidi k'anna ni-mattæi-vli ta ti Jesus ka ni-k'ma, Pako-loulugh-en-au kow Rama, Meirang ki tounnoun ki vullum ki Næi, ka ni-ha-ohou ta mamang k'atta ki Makou-sacyng ki Tama-'oumha, ka 'ǣu-tata-æuf-en-hou ta atta pou-pænæh ki alalak.

D'lligh tou kidi k'anna ni-mattæi-vli ta ti Jesus ka ni-k'ma, Pako-loulugh-en-au kow Rama, Meirang ki tounnoun ki vullum ki Næi, ka ni-ha-ohou ta mamang k'atta ki Makou-sacyng ki Tama-'oumha, ka 'ǣu-tata-æuf-en-hou ta atta pou-pænæh ki alalak.
S.TRANS: In dielelbe tiddt antwoordde Jesus ende leyde ck dancke u Dader Heere des hemels ende der aerden dat ghy dese dingen boor den wijsen efi besftandigen berborgen hebc efi hebt deselbe den kinderkens geopenbaert.
At that time Jesus answered and said, I thank thee, O Father, Lord of heaven and earth, because thou hast hid these things from the wise and prudent, and hast revealed them unto babes.
那時，耶穌說：「父啊，天地的主，我感謝你！因為你將這些事向聰明通達人就藏起來，向嬰孩就顯出來。

S.FORM: Haei Rama, ka na k'ma-hynna ta kam-an ['nhou] tou æ-mæh-æuhou.
Haei Rama, ka na k'ma-hynna ta kam-an ['nhou] tou æ-mæh-æuhou.
S.TRANS: Ja Dader want alfoo is geweelt het wel-behagen boory. â€¦
Even so, Father: for so it seemed good in thy sight.
父啊，是的，因為你的美意本是如此。

S.FORM: Ymmid ki mamang ni-pǣ'æ-tounnoun jau-an ki Rama-au: ka assi kmalang ta ti-mamang ki Alak dyk ki Raraman, assi kma-lang ta ti mamang ki Raraman dyk ki Alak, teni-appa ka kamoei-eih ki Alak mææu-tætææuf pou-pænæh [ki atta.]

Ymmid ki mamang ni-pǣ'æ-tounnoun jau-an ki Rama-au: ka assi kmalang ta ti-mamang ki Alak dyk ki Raraman, assi kmalang ta ti mamang ki Raraman dyk ki Alak, teni-appa ka kamoei-eih ki Alak mææu-tætææuf pou-pænæh [ki atta.]
S.TRANS: Alle dingen rjjn my ober-gegheben ban Pader:ende niemant en kent den Sone dan de Dade: nochte yemant en kent den Dader dan de Sone ende dien Het de Sone wil openbaren.
All things are delivered unto me of my Father: and no man knoweth the Son, but the Father; neither knoweth any man the Father, save the Son, and he to whomsoever the Son will reveal him.
一切所有的，都是我父交付我的；除了父，沒有人知道子；除了子和子所願意指示的，沒有人知道父。

S.FORM: Mou-ymd-â mou-qua jau-an ta ymoumi ka siba ka banou-nouh, ka pa-ouli-au-mau-kamou:
Mou-ymd-â mou-qua jau-an ta ymoumi ka siba ka banou-nouh, ka pa-ouli-au-mau-kamou:
S.TRANS: Homt herwarrts tot mp. alle die bermoept ende belaft zijt ende ick sal u rulie geben ;
Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
凡勞苦擔重擔的人可以到我這裏來，我就使你們得安息。

S.FORM: Arau paka hgalap ymoumi-æn ta p'adden-au, [mæutæu-æug-jau-an] ka pæhtæutæu-an-ei jau-an, ka mahapugh-koh ki rÿh, ka ni-'tdarim-en-appa ki tintin : ka maki-valei-ah-kamou ki pa-ouli-an tou vatti-oumi
Arau paka hgalap ymoumi-æn ta p'adden-au, [mæutæu-æug-jau-an] ka pæhtæutæu-an-ei jau-an, ka mahapugh-koh ki rÿh, ka ni-'tdarim-en-appa ki tintin : ka maki-valei-ah-kamou ki pa-ouli-an tou vatti-oumi
S.TRANS: Take my yoke upon you, and learn of me; for I am meek and lowly in heart: and ye shall find rest unto your souls.
我心裏柔和謙卑，你們當負我的軛，學我的樣式；這樣，你們心裏就必得享安息。

S.FORM: Ka mahahpugh ta p'adden-au, ka mahaäl ta pa-banounoug-en-au.
Ka mahahpugh ta p'adden-au, ka mahaäl ta pa-banounoug-en-au.
S.TRANS: For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light.
因為我的軛是容易的，我的擔子是輕省的。」
